hero.subtitleLine1: A responsible approach to business, reliability in work,
hero.subtitleLine2: and your confidence in the final result.

services.title: Services
services.description: Choose a service and provide your project details.

cases.title: Cases
cases.description: Choose a service and provide your project details.

items.question: What kind of projects do you take on?
items.answer: I work on landing pages, SaaS interfaces, dashboards, and redesigns. The focus is on structured, product-oriented design.

items.question: Do you handle both UX and UI?
items.answer: Yes, I work with flows, layout logic, and interface design. The focus is on usability and clear interaction, not just visuals.

items.question: How is the project structured?
items.answer: Each project follows a defined workflow: brief, structure, interface design, and refinement. The process adapts to the scope and complexity.

items.question: Can you redesign an existing product?
items.answer: Yes, from targeted UX improvements to full redesigns. I work with both existing products and new concepts.

items.question: Do you prepare files for development?
items.answer: Yes, designs are structured and ready for implementation. This includes components, auto layout, and clear hierarchy.

start.title: Start a Project
start.description: Choose a service and provide your project details.

footer.heading: Ready to transform your product?
footer.body: From wireframes to high-fidelity UI. Clean, scalable, and developer-ready designs.

admin.loginSubtitle: Enter the admin password configured on the server (ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env).
admin.loginNetworkError: Could not reach the server. Start it with «npm run server» or «npm run dev:full».
admin.pageIntroServer: Cases for the home grid and portfolio; separately — service cards (image, title, price, portfolio link). Saves to server/data/cases.json.
admin.servicesPortfolioHint: Edit that page’s blocks under «Cases» (including entries marked as service).
admin.footerNoteServer: Production: put the Node server behind HTTPS and a reverse proxy; keep ADMIN_PASSWORD secret. The site reads cases via GET /api/cases.
admin.landingHintPrefix: Preview and title on the home page; click opens

status.savedServer: Saved on the server. Refresh the site to load the latest cases.
status.reset: Reset to built-in defaults on the server.
status.importInvalid: Invalid file: expected a cases array or { cases, landingServices }.
status.importDraft: Imported into draft. Click «Save to site» to apply.
status.sessionExpired: Session expired or access denied. Sign in again.
status.saveFailed: Could not save. Check the server and your connection.

admin.confirmReset: Reset cases and service cards to built-in values on the server? This overwrites server/data/cases.json.
admin.title: Title
admin.imageUrl: Image URL (or keep after file upload)
admin.portfolioSectionTitle: Portfolio — blocks on the case page
admin.cardImageUrl: Block image URL (if not a file)
